title: Film services units - Canada.ca
content:
Film services units are located at the following tax services offices:
- Fraser Valley and Interior – For services performed in British Columbia, Alberta, Saskatchewan, and Manitoba
- Northern Ontario – For services performed in Ontario, the Yukon, Nunavut, and the Northwest Territories
- Western Quebec – For services performed in Quebec, Prince Edward Island, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, and Newfoundland and Labrador

## Fraser Valley and Interior Tax Services Office
Canada Revenue Agency Film Services Unit 9755 King George Blvd Surrey BC  V3T 5E1
Telephone: 1-866-317-0473 Fax: 418-556-1824 (toll-free: 1-833-646-1576) See what information to include with your fax

## Northern Ontario Tax Services Office
Canada Revenue Agency Film Services Unit Suite 100 – 25 St. Clair Avenue East Toronto ON  M4T 0A7
Hours of service: 7:30 am to 5 pm (Eastern time) Telephone: 1-833-446-0934 Fax: 418-556-1824 (toll-free: 1-833-646-1576) See what information to include with your fax

## Western Quebec Tax Services Office
Film Services Unit 305 René-Lévesque Blvd W PO Box 49 Montréal QC  H2Z 1A6
Telephone: 514-496-2231 Fax: 418-556-1824 (toll-free: 1-833-646-1576) See what information to include with your fax

## What information to include with your fax
Include the following information on your fax cover sheet so that your document gets routed correctly and without delays.
- The name of the tax services office that serves your area
- The name of the Canada Revenue Agency employee (if you have it)
- The name of your business
- Your business number
The film services units administer and provide access to all programs dealing with film production that are under the responsibility of the Canada Revenue Agency.
This includes dealing with tax matters related to the federal tax credit program for Canadian productions, and the federal tax credit program for production services rendered in Canada for Canadian or foreign productions.
The film services units serve as a gateway to other services specific to the film industry, such as non-resident actors and behind-the-scenes personnel who provide services in Canada, customs , and the GST / HST .
